name: Endscreen Totals
description: Shows your total attempts on the endscreen

show-practice.name: Show in Practice Mode
show-practice.description: Show totals on the practice mode endscreen

ignore-dt-links.name: Ignore Death Tracker Links
ignore-dt-links.description: Don't inherit linked levels from Death Tracker. Only counts the current level's attempts and jumps.

from-zero-only.name: From 0% Only
from-zero-only.description: Only show the label when playing from the beginning, not from a start position.

show-jumps.name: Show Total Jumps
show-jumps.description:
Also show a Total Jumps label.

<cr>Note:</c> Total jumps for the current level only.

show-time.name: Show Total Time
show-time.description:
Also show a Total Time label with your total playtime on the level.

<cr>Note:</c> Requires Death Tracker; only counts active playtime (not paused or on the death screen).
